title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 Digital Financial Advice Module
summary: Requires governance, documentation, testing, bias and error controls, cybersecurity, privacy safeguards, client disclosures and institutional responsibility for algorithms used to generate digital financial advice.

theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.ai_governance_ethics: Algorithm governance rules for robo-advice by CBB licensees.
theme_notes.ai_emerging_tech.autonomous_smart_system: Regulates algorithmic robo-advice by conventional bank licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Personal Data Protection Law No. 30 of 2018 and CBB Rulebook Volumes 1, 2 and 4
